ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are contextually relevant and consistent with the persona but could be more natural in tone to convey urgency effectively.

The response is contextually neutral and personable but lacks the urgency conveyed in player input, which might affect overall quality for this scenario. Short note: Good persona consistency; could improve by acknowledging the specific situation to enhance relevance and naturalness.

The response shows a high level of context relevance, persona consistency as calm and caring healer, naturalness in dialogue delivery, and overall quality is excellent. The mention of urgency aligns well with the dynamic context without compromising on professionalism or tone.
